hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.(env|env\.local|env\.production)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: refusing to edit .env files — they contain secrets' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '(^|/)uv\.lock$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: uv.lock is auto-generated — use uv add/remove instead' >&2; exit 2; fi
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.py) ruff format --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null;; esac; done; exit 0
